event_notes: Source venue label preserved during 2026-03-18 Wave 2 venue canonicalization: Freestyle, Summit Trails.
event_comments:
Control #113 couldn’t handle the weather and died before the event began. We are working on inserting this control into the splits of anyone who visited it before it was replaced with a more robust control. RouteGadget and splits will be posted once we do this. Thanks for your patience.
